description: Composition Purple polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Wear your brand with style with this polo T-shirt from nike – the one-stop shop for all things sporty. The short sleeves sit snugly on your well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for the perfect semi-formal vibe. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
